name: Single filer - Low income
description: Single person earning €30,000 annually in Berlin, no children

sources.description: Income tax (€2,297) verified via BMF Einkommensteuer-Berechnungsprogramm 2025 for zvE=22,599 (single). Social security computed per official 2025 rates.
sources.notes: §32a EStG 2025: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/estg/__32a.html. Berlin (BE) standard care rate 2.4% childless. Deductions: Werbungskosten €1,230, Sonderausgaben €36, deductible insurance €6,135. zvE = 30,000 - 7,401 = 22,599.
